name: pricing

sections.name: hero
sections.notes: Two-line headline stating outcome, not features. Primary CTA scrolls to plan selector.

sections.name: plan-selector
sections.notes: Three plans. Middle plan marked 'recommended' via visual emphasis (border+label), not gimmicky size.

copyNotes: Plan names describe outcomes ('For teams shipping weekly'), not sizes ('Pro'). No scarcity language.
accessibilityNotes: Plan cards are keyboard-navigable as a radiogroup. Price uses text, not image.
